name: Remerge
description: Mobile retargeting DSP helping app publishers re-engage existing users through programmatic advertising.

seo.title: Remerge — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Remerge: Mobile retargeting DSP helping app publishers re-engage existing users through programmatic advertising.

when_to_use: Retargeting lapsed app users via programmatic DSP campaigns
Re-engagement campaigns for inactive e-commerce app users
Incrementality-measured retargeting for mobile game publishers

cons: Requires mature MMP and LTV setup
review.verdict: Specialized retargeting DSP that's useful when retargeting works, honest about post-ATT limits.
review.best_for: Ecommerce, gaming, or subscription apps with retargetable high-value audiences.
review.not_for: Early-stage apps still trying to acquire their first users at scale.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
